assertion.name: Chris Newman
assertion.statement: Chris Newman is a co-author of both Xiao et al. 2021 (the animal-sales survey) and Worobey et al. 2022 (author 9 of 18).
assertion.note: The single genuinely author-specific finding in the COVID case: the one proximity leg that is data-independent of Worobey 2022 (live-mammal sales, via Xiao 2021) still shares a human with it. One sentence, not a case study — a shared author is a defeasible prior on shared pipeline, NOT a refusal gate (it would wrongly refuse ATLAS/CMS, and we ship a CERN case). Recorded as an identity node, not a derivedFrom edge, so provenance is not conflated with attribution.
